# epilot-notificationtemplate Provider

Notification API: Notification API for epilot 360

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    epilot-notificationtemplate = {
      source  = "epilot-dev/epilot-notificationtemplate"
      version = "0.12.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "epilot-notificationtemplate" {
  epilot_auth = "<YOUR_EPILOT_AUTH>" # Required
  server_url  = "..."                # Optional
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `epilot_auth` (String, Sensitive) Authorization header with epilot OAuth2 bearer token.

### Optional

- `server_url` (String) Server URL (defaults to https://notification.sls.epilot.io)
